allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(data\)\); print\(len\(data\)\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\)\); const v=d.verses[0]; console.log\(''''keys:'''', Object.keys\(v\)\); console.log\(''''translations:'''', v.translations\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\)\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\(''''keys:'''', keys.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\(''''sample:'''', JSON.stringify\(d[keys[0]]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''public/data/lemma-counts.json'',''utf8''\)\); const entries=Object.entries\(d\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\); console.log\(''top 5:'', entries.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\(''file size:'', require\(''fs''\).statSync\(''public/data/lemma-counts.json''\).size, ''bytes''\)")
